ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jun-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Burke Nersesian, Petitioner and Self-Represented Litigant, appeared.

The Court explained how the law construes a disclaimer and inquired whether Mr. Nersesian's brothers had any children. Burke Neresian was sworn and examined by the Court. Mr. Nersesian testified that his brothers, Arthur and Patrick, have no natural or adoptive children. Upon the conclusion of Mr. Nersesian's testimony, the Court granted the petition for letters of administration (order signed). Bond was set at $10,000.00.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Harris. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Aug-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
